name: 前置工序校验通用接口

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.previousProcedure.procedure_detail_id }}
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroidId }}'
order by md.createtime DESC 
limit 1

nodes.name: 查询上一道工序是否完成

parameters.query:
WITH latest_history AS (
    SELECT json_array_elements_text((history_procedure_detail_id->>'history_procedure_detail_id')::json) AS detail_id
    FROM mes.history_procedure_list
    WHERE history_procedure_list_id = '{{ $json.history_procedure_list_id }}'
),
history_ids AS (
    SELECT ARRAY_AGG(detail_id::int) AS ids
    FROM latest_history
),
result_data AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (hpd.procedure_detail_id)
        hpd.*,
        (SELECT array_position(ids, hpd.history_procedure_id) FROM history_ids) AS sort_order
    FROM 
        mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
    WHERE 
        hpd.history_procedure_id IN (
            SELECT detail_id::int FROM latest_history
        )
    AND 
        hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2
)
SELECT *
FROM result_data
ORDER BY sort_order;

SELECT 
       r.retroid_id,
       jo.joborder_number,
       jo.joborder_type,
       jo.joborder_id,
       pm.product_model_name,
       pi.product_code,
       jo.procedure_list_id,
       jo.history_procedure_list_id
FROM mes.retroid r
JOIN mes.retroid_generate rg ON r.retroid_generate_id = rg.retroid_generate_id
JOIN mes.joborder jo ON r.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN mes.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN mes.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.body.sn }}'
  and r.status in('1','2') ;    -- 替换成你要查询的 retroid

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in({{ $json.procedure_detail_id }},62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and ( md.data ->>'machine_data_id_old'='{{ $json.machine_data_id }}')
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

nodes.name: 判断前置工序是否属于前加工

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY md.procedure_detail_id ORDER BY md.createtime DESC) AS rn
  FROM mes.machine_data md
  WHERE md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroidId }}'

    AND md.procedure_detail_id IN ({{ $json.procedure_detail_ids ? $json.procedure_detail_ids : -1 }})
) t
WHERE t.rn = 1

nodes.name: 查询所有前置工序是否完成

parameters.query:
SELECT
  md.*,
  t.machine_data_id AS input_machine_data_id,
  t.retroid_id AS input_retroid_id
FROM
  jsonb_to_recordset('{{ JSON.stringify($json.items) }}'::jsonb)
      AS t(procedure_detail_id int, machine_data_id int, retroid_id int)
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT *
  FROM mes.machine_data md
  WHERE 
     md.retroid_id = t.retroid_id
    AND md.data ->> 'machine_data_id_old' = t.machine_data_id::text
  ORDER BY md.createtime DESC
  LIMIT 1
) md ON TRUE

nodes.name: 确认所有数据没有解绑
校验当前工序是否需要校验所有前置工序
判断是否有需要校验的前置工序
判断绑定数据是否全部解绑

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    data ->> 'operationName' AS operation_name,
    data ->> 'procedure_id' AS skip_procedure_id
FROM 
    mes.machine_data
WHERE 
    procedure_detail_id = 153
    AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroidId }}';

nodes.name: 查询该sn是否存在跳站工序

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    data ->> 'operationName' AS operation_name,
    data ->> 'procedure_id' AS skip_procedure_id
FROM 
    mes.machine_data
WHERE 
    procedure_detail_id = 153
    AND retroid_id = '{{ $('判断前置工序是否属于前加工').item.json.retroidId }}';
